subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of the spirit! The rose-cheeked Cupbearer of the Covenant hath adorned the feast of joy and the wine of constancy and steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست باده روحانی ساقی گلرخ میثاق بزم فرخی آراسته و باده ثبوت و استقامت
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
